title: Create Group from Item Names
excerpt: I have aboard that is populated from a form. Whenever a new Item is added, I would like to automate creating a Group on a different board titled as the item name. Is this possible?

posts.author: JasonHunt (Jason Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml: I have aboard that is populated from a form. Whenever a new Item is added, I would like to automate creating a Group on a different board titled as the item name. Is this possible?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JasonHunt - Welcome to the community. I took a quick look through the Automations and in particular custom Automations and this is currently not possible.

Perhaps add this as a Feature Request here - Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @JasonHunt

Welcome to the community. The only possible way I see is to create an integration app that triggers on add_item and uses the API to create the Group.
